title: Trump, in Latest Pivot, Retracts Threat to Strike Iran Again and Widen the War
summary_full: Mr. Trump said that Iran was close to signing a peace deal. So far, weeks of talks have failed to produce an agreement.
summary_public: Mr. Trump said that Iran was close to signing a peace deal. So far, weeks of talks have failed to produce an agreement.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Iran was close to signing a peace deal
